description: A fan wants to transfer their ticket for a game to a friend.

nodes.task_description: Guide the fan on how to use the 'transfer' feature in the team's mobile app.
The fan enters their friend's email address to send the ticket.

expected_outcome.expected: The system sends a transfer offer to the friend.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the system to confirm the friend has accepted the transfer and the ticket is now in their account.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent verifies the transfer was completed successfully.
